g.text: SELECT name FROM users WHERE age > 21
tokens | SELECT name FROM users WHERE age > 21
addr 4 | OP_LE | r1 →next@6 r2 (skip if age<=21)
cmp| 25 > 21 → TRI_TRUE → fall through to ResultRow
Next: advance slot or cross to right sibling
OP_LE: jump if r1 <= r2 | +1 is NOT <= 0 → NO jump
fall-through to OP_COLUMN | emit name column
NULL input → TRI_NULL | skip row (WHERE = false)
